gist.headline: The hive in your browser
gist.blurb: A new community-built browser extension just landed in the greenhouse. Bring your own pollen and generate images right from your toolbar.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Pollinations Browser Extension to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now easily access Pollinations.ai image generation directly from their browser using their own Pollen credits.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a browser extension puzzle piece or a tiny browser window, representing the new community-built browser extension.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a glowing browser extension puzzle piece next to a retro computer monitor. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. The bee wears a tiny tool belt, rendered with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
